subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath turned toward the Most Exalted Horizon and hath believed in God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. We make mention of him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا ذکر من لدنا لمن توجه الی الافق الاعلی و آمن بالله المهیمن القیوم نذکره
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @praise and encouragement, @firmness in the Covenant
